title: Grassy logo
description: Let's add some grass to your title screen
body:
## Grassy logo
**Please, check the version before installing to select the 
style you want** \
Small resource pack that adds some grass to your title screen! \
Available in 8 styles: grass, grass side, flowers, flowers side, podzol, mycelium, crimson nyilum and warped nyilum.

BIG THANKS to evanhowell for the generator.

New gallery screenshots and 1.20+ version coming really soon \
(and "minceraft" too)
